jiraApiToken.title: Jira API Token (Basic Auth)
jiraApiToken.description: Jira API token with permissions to access issues via REST API. Generate at https://id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens.

jiraEndpointUrl.title: Jira URL
jiraEndpointUrl.description: Jira instance base URL, without trailing slash.

youtrackBaseUrl.title: YouTrack URL
youtrackBaseUrl.description: YouTrack instance base URL, without trailing slash. Used to build project links in sync notifications.

verboseNotify.title: Verbose Notifications
verboseNotify.description: When enabled, manual syncs display detailed sync results as a YouTrack notification popup. Useful in YouTrack Cloud where server logs are not directly accessible.

notificationChannel.title: Notification Channel
notificationChannel.description: Select which channel receives sync log notifications on manual syncs. Configure the corresponding URL field below. 'Disabled' sends no external notification.

ntfyTopicUrl.title: ntfy.sh — Topic URL
ntfyTopicUrl.description: Full ntfy.sh topic URL, including the topic name (e.g. https://ntfy.sh/your-secret-topic). Used when Notification Channel is set to 'ntfy'. Compatible with self-hosted ntfy instances. Treat this URL as sensitive — it acts as your access key.

teamsWebhookUrl.title: Microsoft Teams — Incoming Webhook URL
teamsWebhookUrl.description: Incoming Webhook URL generated from a Teams channel connector. Used when Notification Channel is set to 'Teams'. Treat this URL as sensitive.

slackWebhookUrl.title: Slack — Incoming Webhook URL
slackWebhookUrl.description: Incoming Webhook URL from a Slack app configuration. Used when Notification Channel is set to 'Slack'. Treat this URL as sensitive.

jiraProjectSlug.title: Jira Target Project Key
jiraProjectSlug.description: Key of the target Jira project. Found in the URL: https://your-company.atlassian.net/browse/PROJECT-123.

syncMode.title: Sync Mode
syncMode.description: Controls how issues in this project are synchronized with Jira. 'Enabled' syncs issues normally, 'Dry-Run' logs all actions without making real changes, 'Disabled' skips sync entirely.

overrideCompleted.title: Override Completed Jira Issues
overrideCompleted.description: When enabled, YouTrack will sync issues even if they are marked as closed in Jira (Jira Closed = true). By default, closed Jira issues are skipped to prevent overwriting changes made directly in Jira. Does not apply to Sub-tasks, which are always evaluated independently.

epicItemType.title: Tipo 'Épico' no YouTrack
epicItemType.description: Nome do valor do campo 'Tipo' no YouTrack que deve ser mapeado para Epic no Jira. Deixe em branco para usar o padrão ('Epic').

storyItemType.title: Tipo 'História' no YouTrack
storyItemType.description: Nome do valor do campo 'Tipo' no YouTrack que deve ser mapeado para Story no Jira. Deixe em branco para usar o padrão ('Feature').

taskItemType.title: Tipo 'Tarefa' no YouTrack
taskItemType.description: Nome do valor do campo 'Tipo' no YouTrack que deve ser mapeado para Task no Jira. Deixe em branco para usar o padrão ('Task').

subTaskItemType.title: Tipo 'Subtarefa' no YouTrack
subTaskItemType.description: Nome do valor do campo 'Tipo' no YouTrack que deve ser mapeado para Sub-task no Jira. Deixe em branco para usar o padrão ('Subtask').

priorityHighestName.title: YouTrack 'Highest' Priority Name
priorityHighestName.description: YouTrack Priority field value that maps to Highest in Jira. Leave blank to use the default ('Show-stopper').

priorityHighestNameJira.title: Jira 'Highest' Priority Name
priorityHighestNameJira.description: Exact priority name used in Jira for the Highest tier. Leave blank to use the default ('Highest'). Must match the name shown in your Jira project's priority list.

priorityHighName.title: YouTrack 'High' Priority Name
priorityHighName.description: YouTrack Priority field value that maps to High in Jira. Leave blank to use the default ('Critical').

priorityHighNameJira.title: Jira 'High' Priority Name
priorityHighNameJira.description: Exact priority name used in Jira for the High tier. Leave blank to use the default ('High'). Must match the name shown in your Jira project's priority list.

priorityMediumName.title: YouTrack 'Medium' Priority Name
priorityMediumName.description: YouTrack Priority field value that maps to Medium in Jira. Leave blank to use the default ('Normal'). Note: 'Major' also maps to Medium as a legacy fallback and is not configurable in this version.

priorityMediumNameJira.title: Jira 'Medium' Priority Name
priorityMediumNameJira.description: Exact priority name used in Jira for the Medium tier. Leave blank to use the default ('Medium'). Must match the name shown in your Jira project's priority list.

priorityLowName.title: YouTrack 'Low' Priority Name
priorityLowName.description: YouTrack Priority field value that maps to Low in Jira. Leave blank to use the default ('Minor').

priorityLowNameJira.title: Jira 'Low' Priority Name
priorityLowNameJira.description: Exact priority name used in Jira for the Low tier. Leave blank to use the default ('Low'). Must match the name shown in your Jira project's priority list.

statusDoneStates.title: YouTrack States Mapped to 'Done'
statusDoneStates.description: Comma-separated list of YouTrack State field values that map to Done in Jira. Leave blank to use the default ('Fixed,Verified,Closed,Can't Reproduce,Duplicate,Won't fix,Incomplete').

statusInProgressStates.title: YouTrack States Mapped to 'In Progress'
statusInProgressStates.description: Comma-separated list of YouTrack State field values that map to In Progress in Jira. Everything not listed here or in the Done states will map to To Do. Leave blank to use the default ('In Progress').
